product.savings.title: Savings
product.savings.body: Save on your own or with a group using a solution built for your goal.
product.savings.summary: Fondeka offers four savings solutions: Open Savings, Locked Savings, Likelemba, and AVEC.
product.savings.categories.title: Available categories
product.savings.categories.i1: Personal savings covers savings solutions for one individual.
product.savings.categories.i2: Open savings offers more flexible access to funds.
product.savings.categories.i3: Locked savings lets you save until an end date chosen in advance.
product.savings.categories.i4: Likelemba and AVEC serve group savings needs with two different operating models.
product.savings.personal.title: Personal Savings
product.savings.personal.body: Personal savings includes two solutions: open savings for flexibility and locked savings for more discipline.
product.savings.personal.video.title: Explainer video
product.savings.personal.video.body: See how personal savings works inside Fondeka.
product.savings.personal.compare.title: Open Savings vs Locked Savings
product.savings.personal.compare.body: Both are personal savings solutions, but they serve different goals. Open Savings gives you more flexibility to add and access funds, while Locked Savings is designed to protect a goal until a maturity date.
Best when you want to save progressively while keeping more flexibility.
You can add funds at your own pace and follow your progress in the app.
Access to funds is generally more flexible, subject to the product rules.
Best when you want more discipline around a target or future need.
You choose a maturity date in advance and save toward that deadline.
Funds stay protected until maturity, subject to the product rules.
product.savings.personal.compare.video.t: Detailed explainer: Open Savings vs Locked Savings
product.savings.personal.compare.video.b: Watch this short video for a clearer breakdown of when to choose Open Savings or Locked Savings.
product.savings.personal.opened.title: Open Savings
product.savings.personal.opened.subtitle: Save at your own pace with more freedom over your money.
product.savings.personal.opened.about: A simple way to save at your own pace, track your progress, and keep more flexible access to your money.
product.savings.personal.opened.steps.1: Create your open savings in the app.
product.savings.personal.opened.steps.3: Track your balance and progress in the app.
product.savings.personal.opened.steps.4: Withdraw when needed according to the product rules.
product.savings.personal.opened.benefits: Keep more freedom over your funds
Grow your money through the interest defined by the product
product.savings.personal.opened.interest: Each deposit can generate interest depending on the product terms. The more you save, the more your savings can grow.
product.savings.personal.opened.withdraw: You keep more flexible access to your money, subject to the product rules.
product.savings.personal.locked.title: Locked Savings
product.savings.personal.locked.subtitle: Protect your goal until the right moment.
product.savings.personal.locked.about: A savings solution designed to protect your goal until a date you set in advance.
product.savings.personal.locked.steps.1: Choose locked savings and create your savings in the app.
product.savings.personal.locked.steps.2: Set an end date that corresponds to the maturity of your savings.
product.savings.personal.locked.steps.3: Fund your savings progressively until the target date.
product.savings.personal.locked.steps.4: Access your money at maturity according to the product rules.
product.savings.personal.locked.benefits: Avoid using your money too early
Grow your savings with the interest defined by the product
product.savings.personal.locked.interest: Each deposit can generate interest according to the product terms and help your savings grow over time.
product.savings.personal.locked.withdraw: Your money stays protected until maturity. Early withdrawal may be possible depending on the product rules.
product.savings.likelemba.title: Likelemba
product.savings.likelemba.subtitle: Contribute together and receive the pooled amount on your turn.
product.savings.likelemba.about: A round-based group savings model where each member receives the pooled amount on their turn.
product.savings.likelemba.video.title: Likelemba explainer
product.savings.likelemba.video.body: See how rounds, contributions, and pooled payouts work in practice.
product.savings.likelemba.steps.1: One person creates the group and defines the main rules.
product.savings.likelemba.steps.2: The group sets the contribution, frequency, and beneficiary order.
product.savings.likelemba.steps.3: Members join and contribute every round.
product.savings.likelemba.steps.4: The pooled amount is sent to the planned beneficiary once the round is complete.
product.savings.likelemba.steps.5: The cycle continues until each member has received once.
product.savings.likelemba.benefits.2: Receive a larger amount on your turn
product.savings.likelemba.benefits.4: Fund a need or project at the right time
product.savings.avec.title: AVEC
product.savings.avec.subtitle: Build a shared treasury and move forward together.
product.savings.avec.about: A group savings solution built around a shared treasury that grows through regular contributions, with clear governance for important decisions.
product.savings.avec.video.title: AVEC explainer
product.savings.avec.video.body: Understand how the shared treasury grows and is tracked over time.
product.savings.avec.steps.1: One person creates the AVEC group and defines the main rules.
product.savings.avec.steps.2: The group defines contributions and payment frequency.
product.savings.avec.steps.4: Contributions build up in the shared treasury.
product.savings.avec.steps.5: The group uses the reserve and follows its governance rules for important decisions.
product.savings.avec.benefits.4: Manage a more structured group savings model
product.savings.avec.governance.title: Governance designed for the group
product.savings.avec.governance.body: AVEC is not only about a shared fund. It also includes governance rules that allow the group to participate in important decisions.
product.savings.avec.governance.point.1: Some important decisions follow an approval process.
product.savings.avec.governance.point.2: The administrator can propose a change.
product.savings.avec.governance.point.3: Members must review it and approve it.
product.savings.avec.governance.point.4: A change is applied only if the required approval level is reached.
product.savings.avec.governance.admin.bo: The administrator can submit change proposals, but they are not applied automatically.
product.savings.avec.governance.member.b: Group members take part in validating governance changes according to the defined rules.
product.savings.compare.title: Simple summary
product.savings.compare.i1: Open savings is ideal for someone who wants more flexibility.
product.savings.compare.i2: Locked savings is ideal for someone who wants more discipline.
product.savings.compare.i3: Likelemba is ideal for a group that wants to contribute together and give the full pooled amount to one member at each round.
product.savings.compare.i4: AVEC is ideal for a group that wants to build a shared treasury and use it collectively according to defined rules.
product.savings.compare.detail.title: Likelemba vs AVEC
product.savings.compare.detail.body: Both are group savings models, but they do not work the same way. Likelemba rotates the full pooled amount from one member to another, while AVEC keeps building a shared treasury that the group manages together.
product.savings.compare.detail.likelemba: Best when the group wants each member to receive the full pooled amount in turn.
The payout is planned in advance according to an agreed order.
Each round usually ends with one beneficiary receiving the full contribution pot.
product.savings.compare.detail.avec.i1: Best when the group wants to grow and manage one common treasury over time.
product.savings.compare.detail.avec.i2: Funds stay in the group treasury instead of rotating automatically to one member each round.
product.savings.compare.detail.avec.i3: Important decisions can follow governance and approval rules defined by the group.
product.savings.compare.video.title: Detailed explainer: Likelemba vs AVEC
product.savings.compare.video.body: Watch this short video for a clearer breakdown of how the two group models differ in practice.
product.savings.note: Exact deposit, withdrawal, and interest rules depend on the product selected in the app.
product.savings.cta: Download the app to start saving
product.loans.summary: A simple way to request financing and track repayment directly in the app.
product.loans.hero.title: Request simply. Track clearly.
product.loans.hero.body: Fondeka helps you request a loan in the app, receive funds according to the product rules, and follow repayment with better visibility.
product.loans.about.title: What is a Fondeka loan?
product.loans.about.body: A Fondeka loan is designed to help you cover an important need, handle an emergency, or support a personal project through a simple and clear mobile journey.
product.loans.how.title: How it works
product.loans.how.steps.1: Open the loans section in the app.
product.loans.how.steps.2: Review the information available for your loan.
product.loans.how.steps.3: Choose the amount you want to request according to the product rules.
product.loans.how.steps.5: Receive the funds according to the product rules.
product.loans.how.steps.6: Track your loan and repayment directly in the app.
product.loans.repayment.title: Repayment
product.loans.repayment.body: Repayment is handled with an available payment method in the app. You keep clear visibility on your remaining amount and your progress.
Check what is left to repay at any time directly in the app.
product.loans.repayment.panel.progress.b: Follow repayment step by step with a clearer view of your progress.
product.loans.benefits.title: Why choose Fondeka?
product.loans.why.title: A clearer experience
product.loans.why.body: Fondeka helps you view the important information, follow your loan, and manage repayment in a simple and understandable way.
product.loans.tracking.title: Track your loan in the app
product.loans.tracking.body: See the important details of your loan, your remaining amount, and the progress of your repayment directly from your phone.
product.loans.tracking.mock.label: Loan tracking
product.loans.funds.title: Receive the funds
product.loans.funds.body: Once the request is processed according to the product rules, the funds are sent through the service's supported payout method.
product.loans.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
product.loans.faq.a1: A financing solution available in the app to help with a personal need or an emergency.
product.loans.faq.q2: How do I request a loan?
product.loans.faq.a2: Open the loans section, review the available information, choose the amount you want, and confirm your request.
product.loans.faq.a3: Funds are sent according to the product rules and the payout method supported by the service.
product.loans.faq.q4: How do I track and repay my loan?
product.loans.faq.a4: You can track your loan, see the remaining amount, and make repayments directly in the app using an available payment method.
product.loans.note: Amounts, timelines, disbursement conditions, and repayment terms depend on the product rules configured in the app.
product.loans.cta: Download the app to request a loan
